@@ -87,6 +87,7 @@ static MEGA_JSONL_SEQ: AtomicU64 = AtomicU64::new(0);
 
 /// A curated Mermaid sample for the mega showcase.
 struct MegaSample {
+    id: &'static str,
     name: &'static str,
     source: &'static str,
 }
@@ -105,6 +106,8 @@ fn mega_sample_category(sample: &MegaSample) -> &'static str {
         "block-beta"
     } else if src.starts_with("architecture-beta") {
         "architecture-beta"
+    } else if src.starts_with("journey") {
+        "journey"
     } else if src.starts_with("sequenceDiagram") {
         "sequence"
     } else if src.starts_with("classDiagram") {

+        id: "gantt-basic",
         name: "Gantt",
         source: "gantt
    title Project Plan
    section Design
    Wireframes :a1, 2024-01-01, 7d
    Mockups :a2, after a1, 5d
    section Dev
    Frontend :b1, after a2, 14d
    Backend :b2, after a2, 14d",

     MegaSample {
+        id: "mindmap-basic",

  root((Project))

     },
     // -- Sequence samples (bd-3oaig.5.2) --
     MegaSample {
+        id: "sequence-loops",
         name: "Sequence Loops",
         source: "sequenceDiagram
    participant C as Client
    participant S as Server
    participant DB as Database
    C->>S: Login
    activate S
    S->>DB: Query user
    activate DB
    DB-->>S: User data
    deactivate DB
    alt Valid credentials
        S-->>C: 200 OK
    else Invalid
        S-->>C: 401 Unauthorized
    end
    deactivate S
    loop Every 30s
        C->>S: Heartbeat
        S-->>C: ACK
    end",
     },
     MegaSample {
+        id: "sequence-parallel",
         name: "Sequence Parallel",
         source: "sequenceDiagram
    participant U as User
    participant GW as Gateway
    participant A as Auth Service
    participant P as Product Service
    participant O as Order Service
    U->>GW: Place Order
    par Auth Check
        GW->>A: Validate token
        A-->>GW: OK
    and Inventory
        GW->>P: Check stock
        P-->>GW: Available
    end
    GW->>O: Create order
    Note over O: Processing...
    O-->>GW: Order ID
    GW-->>U: Confirmation",
     },
     // -- Class diagram samples (bd-3oaig.5.3) --
     MegaSample {
+        id: "class-inheritance",
         name: "Class Inheritance",
         source: "classDiagram
    class Shape {
        <<abstract>>
        +area() float
        +perimeter() float
    }
    class Circle {
        -float radius
        +area() float
    }
    class Rectangle {
        -float width
        -float height
        +area() float
    }
    class Square {
        +Square(float side)
    }
    Shape <|-- Circle
    Shape <|-- Rectangle
    Rectangle <|-- Square
    Shape *-- Color",
     },
     MegaSample {
+        id: "class-large",
         name: "Class Large",
         source: "classDiagram
    class Controller {
        +handle()
    }
    class Service {
        +execute()
    }
    class Repository {
        +find()
        +save()
    }
    class Model {
        +validate()
    }
    class DTO {
        +serialize()
    }
    class Mapper {
        +toDTO()
        +toModel()
    }
    class Config {
        +load()
    }
    class Logger {
        +info()
        +error()
    }
    class Cache {
        +get()
        +set()
    }
    class Queue {
        +push()
        +pop()
    }
    Controller --> Service
    Service --> Repository
    Service --> Cache
    Repository --> Model
    Controller --> DTO
    Mapper --> DTO
    Mapper --> Model
    Service --> Logger
    Service --> Queue
    Config <.. Service",
     },
     // -- State diagram samples (bd-3oaig.5.4) --
     MegaSample {
+        id: "state-nested",
         name: "State Nested",
         source: "stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Active
    state Active {
        [*] --> Running
        state Running {
            [*] --> Normal
            Normal --> Degraded : high_load
            Degraded --> Normal : load_reduced
        }
        Running --> Paused : pause
        Paused --> Running : resume
    }
    Active --> Stopped : shutdown
    Stopped --> Active : restart
    Stopped --> [*]",
     },
     MegaSample {
+        id: "state-parallel",
         name: "State Parallel",
         source: "stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Online
    state Online {
        state Network {
            Connected --> Disconnected : timeout
            Disconnected --> Connected : reconnect
        }
        --
        state Auth {
            LoggedIn --> LoggedOut : expire
            LoggedOut --> LoggedIn : login
        }
    }
    Online --> Offline : shutdown
    Offline --> [*]",
     },
     // -- ER diagram samples (bd-3oaig.5.5) --
     MegaSample {
+        id: "er-complex",
         name: "ER Complex",
         source: "erDiagram
    CUSTOMER {
        int id PK
        string name
        string email UK
    }

        int id PK
        date created
        string status
    }
    PRODUCT {
        int id PK
        string name
        float price
    }
    LINE_ITEM {
        int qty
        float subtotal
    }
    ADDRESS {
        string street
        string city
    }
    CUSTOMER ||--o{ ORDER : places
    CUSTOMER ||--o{ ADDRESS : has
    ORDER ||--|{ LINE_ITEM : contains
    PRODUCT ||--o{ LINE_ITEM : includes
    ORDER }o--|| ADDRESS : ships_to",
     },
     MegaSample {
+        id: "er-minimal",
         name: "ER Minimal",

    USER ||--o{ POST : writes

  api:R --> L:auth
  auth:R --> L:cache
  cache:R --> L:db",

@@ -2234,6 +2273,22 @@ impl MermaidMegaShowcaseScreen {
         }
     }
 
+    /// Select a sample by stable id (used by snapshot tests).
+    ///
+    /// This avoids brittle index-based navigation when new samples are inserted.
+    #[doc(hidden)]
+    pub fn select_sample_by_id_for_test(&mut self, id: &str) -> bool {
+        let Some(idx) = MEGA_SAMPLES.iter().position(|s| s.id == id) else {
+            return false;
+        };
+
+        self.state.selected_sample = idx;
+        self.state.selected_node = None;
+        self.state.rebuild_search_matches();
+        self.state.bump_analysis();
+        true
+    }
+
     /// Map a key event to an action.
     fn handle_key(&self, event: &ftui_core::event::KeyEvent) -> Option<MegaAction> {
         use ftui_core::event::{KeyCode, KeyEventKind, Modifiers};
